Help fill in the [compatibility matrix](../../blob/main/docs/COMPATIBILITY.md)!

**Controller** (from *Open Aurora…* → device line)
- Model id: <!-- e.g. SK0124 -->
- LEDs reported by Aurora: <!-- e.g. 54 -->
- Your strip's actual LED count (if you know it):
- Screen size / product:

**Did it work?**
- Detected automatically? <!-- yes / no -->
- Colors correct (red/green/blue map right)? <!-- yes / swapped / other -->
- Screen Sync looks right? <!-- yes / mirrored / no -->
- Music Sync reacts? <!-- yes / no -->
- Circadian / Scene? <!-- yes / no -->
